title: crinum × haylockii
intro: Crinum × haylockii, also known as the Pink Polly Plant, is a hybrid of the crinum lily family, characterized by its vibrant pink or white flowers and sword-shaped leaves. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crinum × haylockii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate skin irritations, and provide relief from respiratory issues. The plant's herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
